mapper.select: select id, site_name, site_logo, site_description, site_notice, footer_info, github_url, gitee_url, avatar, create_time, update_time from site_config order by id asc limit 1
mapper.update: update site_config set site_name = #{siteName}, site_logo = #{siteLogo}, site_description = #{siteDescription}, site_notice = #{siteNotice}, footer_info = #{footerInfo}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, gitee_url = #{giteeUrl}, avatar = #{avatar} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into site_config ( site_name, site_logo, site_description, site_notice, footer_info, github_url, gitee_url, avatar ) values ( #{siteName}, #{siteLogo}, #{siteDescription}, #{siteNotice}, #{footerInfo}, #{githubUrl}, #{giteeUrl}, #{avatar} )
